summary: Round 2 review found one remaining blocker: the basal-area-calculator result panel never rendered the per-acre stand density, even though the registry description promised it and the code computed it. This was fixed in round 2 by displaying both BA per hectare and BA per acre in the result panel, and adding the `result.baPerAcre` translation key. All three description-length BLOCKERs from round 1 (allele-frequency, animal-mortality-rate, basal-area) were resolved. The hard-coded `obs:` label in allele-frequency-calculator.tsx was moved to `t('result.obs')`. The fixtures-barrel regeneration is an explicitly required step per the porting instructions. After round-2 fixes, no further BLOCKERs remain.

items.message: Per-acre output was never displayed. Fixed: both BA per hectare (m²/ha) and BA per acre (m²/acre) are now rendered in the result panel, and result.baPerAcre key added to en.json.
